concerns.text: Tasks T011, T011b, and T011c related to the consent form appear to be out of order. T011 configures environment variables *after* T011b creates the consent file, and T011c defines the IRB protocol ID. The file creation (T011b) should precede the configuration that references it (T011), and the protocol ID definition (T011c) should follow the configuration. This creates a dependency issue where the file might not exist when the configuration attempts to use it.

The sequence of tasks T023a-f (IP capture, hashing, flagging, demographic data, truncation) feels slightly disjointed. While logically related, grouping the IP-related tasks (T023a-c) together and then the demographic/metadata tasks (T023d-f) would improve readability and highlight the data flow.

The 'Independent Test' description for User Story 0 is excellent. Consider adding similar, concise 'Independent Test' descriptions to the other User Story phases for clarity and immediate verification guidance.
